title: Time of year ore
description: Travel and mine ores in 4 types, depending on the biome!
body:
![SayNooty "Time of year ore"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9d545ec54d47bf81bad62c8284b30437971f6f4.png)

# Time of year ore
**Time of year ore - this is a mod that adds 4 types of ores to Minecraft: Winter, spring, summer, autumn. Each ore has its own chance of appearing in any biome.**

Explore the world to find various survival items or decorations in your hideout! Make deals with a peasant farmer to get leaves, they will be useful to you in the future! Never tried honey broth, with this mod it will be possible!
## 

### **Spawn ores:**
- Winter Ore "Winter biomes"
- Spring Ore "Warm biomes"
- Summer Ore "Hot biomes"
- Autumn Ore "Cool biomes"
## 
### **Note:**
When passing the mod, you can find various objects and blocks by type: leaves or carved stone bricks with a special texture.

When you are wearing the entire set of interseasonal armor, you will not burn in lava! You can get interseasonal armor by combining netherite armor with an interseasonal ingot!
